hero.description: Horizon Tech d.o.o. ni kompanyi y'ubuhinga kw'isi yose ifise icicaro i Sarajevo, itanga ibisubizo bigezweho vya software ku mashirahamwe yo ku migabane itatu.

mission.title: Mission
mission.description: Turafasha amashirahamwe guhindura ivyiyumviro bihambaye mu bicuruzwa vya digitale vyizewe bituma ubudandaji bupimwa.
points: Guhuza ubuhinga bwa none hamwe n'ivyavuye mu budandaji bitomoye.
Kwubaka imigambi y'igihe kirekire iguma igumye uko imigwi ikura.
Gukorana n'abafatanyabikorwa kuva ku migambi gushika mu gushira mu ngiro.

expertise.title: Ubuhinga
expertise.description: Imigwi yacu itandukanye ihuza ubuhinga n'ivyiyumviro vy'ibicuruzwa mu buhinga bwa none.
points: Cloud architecture, DevOps automation, and resilient infrastructure.
Applied AI/ML, data workflows, and IoT-enabled products.

approach.title: Uburyo
approach.description: Dukoresha uburyo bugezweho kandi bugezweho butuma ibicuruzwa biguma vyitezwe, bikagabanya akaga k'ibicuruzwa.
points: Discover: define scope, priorities, and success metrics early.
Build: ship in focused increments with continuous feedback loops.
Optimize: Monitor results and improve performance over time.

cta.title: Woba witeguriye guhindura ubucuruzi bwawe?
cta.description: Kwinjira ku rutonde rugenda rukura rw'amashirahamwe yizeye Horizon Tech mu gutanga inyishu nshasha hamwe n'ibisubizo bidasanzwe.

hero.title: Contact Us
hero.description: Woba ufise umugambi mu mutwe? Twipfuza kwumva ibivuye kuri wewe. Nimuze muganire ku kuntu twogufasha gushira mu ngiro ivyiyumviro vyanyu mu buzima.

email.title: Email
email.description: Urashobora kutwandikira email umwanya uwariwo wose

form.title: Twongereko ubutumwa
form.success: Murakoze Cane Ku Butumwa Mutugejejeho. Turungikire ubutumwa bwawe tukwishura imbere yamasaha 24-48.
form.error: Hari ikintu kitagenda neza. Turagusavye usubire kugerageza canke utwandikire kuri email imbonankubone.
form.subject: Ingingo *

placeholders.name: Izina ryawe
placeholders.subject: Ni igiki twofasha?
placeholders.message: Mutubwire ibijanye n'ivyiyumviro vyawe canke ivyiyumviro vyawe ku bijanye n'ico gikorwa...

validation.email: Nyamuneka wandike aderesi ya email yemewe.
validation.messageMinLength: Ubutumwa butegerezwa kuba bufise n'imiburiburi inyuguti {{count}} .

reasons: Iterambere rya Agile hamwe n'itumanaho rigezweho
Imfashanyo y'igihe kirekire no kubungabunga ibidukikije

custom.title: Custom Solutions
custom.description: Woba uriko urarondera umuti w'ibibazo bikwiye? Dukorana n'abakiriya kugira dutahure ibikenewe bidasanzwe no gutanga software isanzwe itanga ibisubizo bipimwa.

faq.title: Woba ufise ibindi bibazo?
faq.description: Raba ikiganiro cacu ca FAQ kugira ubone inyishu zihuta

hero.description: Umugwi w'abahinga mu vy'ubuhinga bwa none, abahinga mu vy'ubuhinga hamwe n'abahinga mu vy'ubuhinga bwa none bariko barakora ibicuruzwa vya digitale bihanitse.

section.title: Umugwi w'abarongozi
section.description: Umuyobozi w'Akarere ka Rubavu wungirije ushinzwe imibereho myiza y'abaturage n'iterambere ry'Umujyi wa Kigali

hamza.bio: Visionary leader and technical architect with 10+ years in enterprise software, specializing in AI/ML, cloud platforms, and scalable product architecture.

ahmet.bio: Cybersecurity specialist focused on enterprise security architecture, secure on-prem infrastructure, and compliance-first delivery for regulated environment.

culture.title: Ubuzima muri Horizon Tech
culture.description: Duteza imbere umuco wo guhanga udushya, ugusenyera ku mugozi umwe no kwiga

remoteFirst.title: Umuco wa mbere wa kure
remoteFirst.description: Gukorera aho ari ho hose ukoresheje amasaha ahinduka, wibanda ku bivamwo, atari ahantu.

collaborative.title: Ibidukikije vy'ubufatanye
collaborative.description: Ibikorwa vy'imigwi yama bihoraho, ibiganiro vyo gusangira ubumenyi, hamwe n'ugufashanya hagati y'abakozi.

workLife.title: Uburinganire hagati y'akazi n'ubuzima
workLife.description: Uburyo bwo kuruhuka, ubufasha bw'amagara yo mu mutwe, no kwubaha umwanya w'umuntu ku giti ciwe.

innovation.title: Umwanya wo guhanga udushya
innovation.description: 20% y'umwanya wo gukora imishinga y'umuntu ku giti ciwe, hackathons, hamwe no kurondera ubuhinga bushasha.

cta.title: Woba wipfuza kwinjira mu mugwi wacu?
cta.description: Tuzokwama turondera abantu b'incabwenge bitwararika ubukorikori, ubutunzi hamwe n'ubuhinga.

hero.description: Join a team of engineers building cutting-edge software for global clients. Kora kure, gukura mu buryo bukomeye, kandi ugire ingaruka zikomeye.

process.title: Our Hiring Process
process.description: Kwitondera, kwinonora imitsi no kwubahiriza umwanya wawe

steps.title: Apply
steps.description: Andika ubusabe bwawe kandi tuzobisuzuma mu minsi 3 y'akazi.

steps.title: Ikiganiro ca mbere
steps.description: Koresha videwo y'iminota 30 kugira uganire ku vyo wipfuza be n'ivyo wipfuza.

steps.title: Tekiniki
steps.description: Ibiganiro vy'ubuhinga canke imyimenyerezo yo kwerekana ubuhanga bwawe.

steps.title: Gutanga
steps.description: Hura n'umugwi w'abahinga mu vy'ubuhinga ngurukanabumenyi, maze ubone ubutumire bwawe bwo kwinjira muri Horizon Tech.

jobs.title: Imyanya yuguruye
jobs.description: Rondera amahirwe yawe akurikira hanyuma winjire mu mugwi wacu ugenda utera imbere

listings.title: Senior Full-Stack Engineer
listings.description: Kwubaka porogaramu z'ubucuruzi zigezweho ukoresheje React, Node.js, hamwe n'ubuhinga bwa Cloud.

listings.title: DevOps Engineer
listings.description: Gutunganya no kubungabunga imiyoboro ya CI/CD, ibikorwa-remezo nk'ikode, hamwe n'uburyo bwo kugenzura.

listings.title: Injeniyeri wa AI/ML
listings.description: Gushiraho uburyo bwo kwiga imashini hamwe n'ibisubizo vya AI ku bakiriya b'amasosiyete.

listings.title: Product Designer
listings.description: Create beautiful, intuitive user experiences for complex enterprise applications.

listings.title: Solutions Architect
listings.description: Gushiraho ivyiyumviro vy'ubuhinga bwa none no kuyobora abakiriya biciye mu mpinduka za digitale.

listings.title: Umwanditsi w'ubuhinga
listings.description: Kora ivyigwa vyuzuye, ivyigwa hamwe n'ivyiyumviro vy'ubuhinga.

cta.title: Ibibazo ku bijanye n'akazi ngaha?
cta.description: Twipfuza kwumva ibivuye kuri wewe. Fyonda ngaha kandi tuzokwishura ibibazo vyose bijanye n'ubuzima bwa Horizon Tech.

hero.description: Raba ingene twafashije amashirahamwe mu mahinguriro guhindura ibikorwa biciye mu buhinga bugezweho kandi bukomeye.

items.title: Cloud Migration & Modernization
items.description: Kwimurira uburyo bw'amabanki bwa kera mu bikorwa remezo vy'igicu vya AWS ata gihe co kuruhuka.

items.title: AI-Powered Diagnostic Platform

items.title: Real-Time Analytics Dashboard
items.description: Developed BI platform processing 10M+ events daily.

newsletter.note: Nta spam. Kwiyandikisha umwanya uwo ari wo wose.

faqs.question: Horizon Tech itanga serivisi izihe?
faqs.answer: Dutanga iterambere rya software zisanzwe, ibisubizo vya AI / ML, ubwubatsi bw'ibicu, DevOps, ubwenge bw'ubucuruzi, na serivisi za IoT.

faqs.question: Ni gute natanguza umushinga na Horizon Tech?
faqs.answer: Utumenyeshe ukoresheje fomu canke kuri e-mail kugira ushobore kuronka ivyo ukeneye. Tuzotunganya ikiganiro c'ubushakashatsi, hanyuma dusangize ivyiyumviro.

faqs.question: Woba ubandanya utanga imfashanyo n'imfashanyo?
faqs.answer: Egome. Dutanga amapaki yo gushigikira no kubungabunga harimwo gukosora amakosa, amavugurura y'umutekano, hamwe n'ukwongereza ibintu.
